blended.narrative: Tamarack is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 4,788 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Tuesday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 3" over the past week. Current depth: 36".
